ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., IBM) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol (e.g., IBM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the stock (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices_exchanges" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id", "symbol_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_sectors" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_industries" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the symbol */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_symbols" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_users" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_tags_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)
